summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GigInsure Module 3 (Risk & Severity Engine) and Module 4 (Financial Engine). Backend APIs 91.9% successful, frontend UI and integrations working excellently. All new trigger evaluation, claims management, rewards system, and dashboard features are functional.

minor_bugs.issue: Policy creation fails with 400 error when user already has active policy
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior - duplicate policy prevention working correctly

test_artifacts.issue: Brute force protection returns 429 instead of expected 401 on 6th attempt
test_artifacts.impact: Test expectation issue - 429 is correct response for rate limiting

passed_tests: POST /api/triggers/evaluate with heavy rain scenario (rainfall_mm:55) returns insurance_payout decision
POST /api/triggers/evaluate with extreme heat scenario (temperature:43) returns reward_coins decision with 70 coins
POST /api/triggers/evaluate with cyclone scenario (rainfall_mm:85, wind_speed_kmh:55) returns extreme severity
POST /api/triggers/evaluate with live weather (no manual_weather) works correctly
Duplicate claim within 24h is correctly rejected by fraud detection with 'duplicate_claim_24h' flag
GET /api/claims/history returns claims with payout amounts (6 claims, ₹132 total payout)
GET /api/rewards/history returns reward events with coin details (8 rewards, 320 coins earned)
GET /api/triggers/history returns trigger evaluation events (9 triggers)
GET /api/dashboard/summary returns complete summary with claims, rewards, wallet data
POST /api/wallet/redeem with 100 coins works correctly (redemption ID generated)
POST /api/wallet/redeem with insufficient coins returns 400 error correctly
POST /api/severity returns current severity classification (none/clear)
POST /api/risk-score returns AI risk assessment (5/100 risk score)
Frontend Claims page loads with trigger evaluation panel and scenario selector
Frontend Claims page - scenario selector dropdown works (Extreme Heat scenario tested)
Frontend Claims page - evaluate trigger button triggers evaluation and shows result dialog with processing steps
Frontend Rewards page loads with wallet overview (190 available coins) and redeem buttons
Frontend Dashboard shows stats (Total Payouts: ₹132, Claims: 1/6, Coins: 390, Wallet Balance: ₹134)
Frontend navigation includes Claims and Rewards tabs and works correctly
Frontend trigger result dialog shows processing pipeline steps and reward breakdown (+70 coins for extreme heat)
Frontend coin redemption functionality works (100 coins redeemed successfully)
Frontend user menu and logout button accessible and functional
